# Beacon

> Lightweight, opinionated MobX-powered state management for React.

Beacon wraps MobX with a thin store-creation interface that enforces consistent organization of observable state, computed/derived state, and actions. It supports composable middleware and is published as a monorepo under the `@apogeelabs` npm scope.

## Packages

### Stable

| Package | npm | Description |
|---------|-----|-------------|
| `packages/beacon` | `@apogeelabs/beacon` | Core library — store creation, middleware composition, MobX abstraction |
| `packages/beacon-browserstorage` | `@apogeelabs/beacon-browserstorage` | Middleware for persisting/hydrating store state to localStorage or sessionStorage |
| `packages/beacon-react-utils` | `@apogeelabs/beacon-react-utils` | React hooks for observing and interacting with Beacon stores |

### Experimental (In Development)

| Package | npm | Description |
|---------|-----|-------------|
| `packages/beacon-actorstore` | `@apogeelabs/beacon-actorstore` | XState v5 actor model integration for Beacon stores |

### Deprecated — Do Not Use

| Package | npm | Reason |
|---------|-----|--------|
| `packages/beacon-reactquery` | `@apogeelabs/beacon-reactquery` | Fundamentally flawed approach. Do not use, do not reference, do not generate code for this package. |

## Documentation

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `ReadMe.LLM` | Complete API reference and code generation guide |
| `Patterns.md` | Established usage patterns |
| `DEVELOP.md` | Development and contribution guide |
| `CLAUDE.md` | AI agent instructions for working on this repo |
| `packages/*/README.md` | Per-package READMEs |
| `packages/*/llms-usage.md` | Per-package LLM-oriented usage guides |
